note: ETMOD ET_2025 active-instrument map to governing Ethiopia law. Instrument keys are the model's EUROMOD-convention policy names (structure metadata only; no licensed content). All governing instruments below are captured in axiom-corpus and encoded in this repository (rulespec-et#1, closed 2026-07-09 with two findings).

instruments.governing_law: Income Tax (Amendment) Proclamation No. 1395/2025 Schedule A monthly bands (2,000/4,000/7,000/10,000/14,000 birr at 15/20/25/30/35 percent, first 2,000 exempt) on the Proclamation 979/2016 gross-employment base (Arts 10(3), 65(1)(c))

Proclamation No. 1395/2025 Schedule C annual bands (24,000/48,000/84,000/120,000/168,000) and Article 23 minimum alternative tax (2.5 percent of turnover top-up; two parity findings recorded on the model's MAT treatment)
Proclamation No. 1395/2025 presumptive schedule: 2/3/5/7/9 percent marginal on annual turnover to 2,000,000 birr (Category A/B split at 2,000,000)

Private Organization Employees' Pension Proclamation No. 715/2011 (7 percent employee / 11 percent employer) and Public Servants' Pension Proclamation No. 714/2011 (7/11; military and police employer share 25 percent under Article 11)
VAT Proclamation No. 1341/2024, 15 percent standard rate; domestic electricity above 200 kWh and water above 15 cubic metres per Directive No. 1021/2024 thresholds

instruments.instrument: bsaur00_et - bsaur03_et (PSNP urban/rural public works and direct support)
instruments.governing_law: Administrative: PSNP implementation manuals (urban PW 203 birr/day x 4 days, DS 711 birr/month; rural arms) - programme amounts documented as parity dispositions where no gazetted instrument fixes them

instruments.instrument: bed01_et / bed02_et (school feeding and uniforms, in kind)
instruments.governing_law: Administrative: Addis Ababa school feeding (20 birr per school day x food CPI) and grade-banded uniform amounts - model calibration documented as dispositions
Administrative: consumer-price subsidy gross-up (fuel 40 percent, kerosene 33 percent) from petroleum pricing policy - documented as dispositions
